allow: PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Users\\carli\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages\\Gyan.FFmpeg_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\\ffmpeg-8.1-full_build\\bin;$env:PATH"; Set-Location "C:\\Temp\\lipglace-promo-render"; ffprobe -version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Output "---rendering---"; npx hyperframes render 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)

PowerShell($candidates = @\("C:\\Users\\carli\\Downloads","C:\\Users\\carli\\Desktop","C:\\Users\\carli\\Documents","C:\\Users\\carli\\Videos","C:\\Users\\carli\\Pictures","C:\\Users\\carli\\OneDrive\\Documents","C:\\Users\\carli\\OneDrive\\Desktop","C:\\Users\\carli\\OneDrive\\Pictures"\); foreach\($p in $candidates\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ Get-ChildItem -Path $p -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'lluvia|rojo|libstick|lipstick' } | Select-Object FullName } })

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Users\\carli\\Downloads","C:\\Users\\carli\\Desktop","C:\\Users\\carli\\Documents","C:\\Users\\carli\\Videos","C:\\Users\\carli\\Pictures","C:\\Users\\carli\\OneDrive\\Documents","C:\\Users\\carli\\OneDrive\\Desktop","C:\\Users\\carli\\OneDrive\\Pictures","C:\\Users\\carli\\OneDrive"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ Get-ChildItem -Path $p -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'lluvia|rojo|libstick|lipstick|video' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.FullName } } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\carli\\Downloads\\lluvia roja" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{n='SizeMB';e={if\(-not $_.PSIsContainer\){[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}}}, Extension, FullName)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\carli\\Downloads\\lluvia roja\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{n='SizeMB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}}; Write-Output "---probe video---"; $env:PATH = "C:\\Users\\carli\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages\\Gyan.FFmpeg_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\\ffmpeg-8.1-full_build\\bin;$env:PATH"; ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries stream=width,height,r_frame_rate,duration,codec_name -of default=noprint_wrappers=1 "C:\\Users\\carli\\Downloads\\lluvia roja\\lluvia roja.mp4" 2>&1; Write-Output "---probe audio---"; ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration,bit_rate -show_entries stream=codec_name,sample_rate,channels -of default=noprint_wrappers=1 "C:\\Users\\carli\\Downloads\\lluvia roja\\lluvia roja.MP3" 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Users\\carli\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages\\Gyan.FFmpeg_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\\ffmpeg-8.1-full_build\\bin;$env:PATH"; New-Item -Path "C:\\Temp\\lluvia-frames" -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null; $src = "C:\\Users\\carli\\Downloads\\lluvia roja\\lluvia roja.mp4"; @\(0,3,6,9,12,15,18,21,24,26\) | ForEach-Object { $t = $_; $out = "C:\\Temp\\lluvia-frames\\frame_$\('{0:D2}' -f $t\)s.jpg"; ffmpeg -y -ss $t -i $src -frames:v 1 -q:v 4 -vf "scale=540:-1" $out 2>&1 | Out-Null; Write-Output "$t s -> $out" }; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Temp\\lluvia-frames" | Select-Object Name, @{n='KB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}})

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Users\\carli\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages\\Gyan.FFmpeg_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\\ffmpeg-8.1-full_build\\bin;$env:PATH"; Set-Location "C:\\Temp\\lluvia-roja-render"; npx hyperframes render 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 60)

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Users\\carli\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages\\Gyan.FFmpeg_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\\ffmpeg-8.1-full_build\\bin;$env:PATH"; $src = "C:\\Users\\carli\\Downloads\\lluvia roja\\lluvia roja.mp4"; @\(20.5, 21.0, 21.4, 21.8, 22.2, 22.6, 23.0, 23.4\) | ForEach-Object { $t = $_; $out = "C:\\Temp\\lluvia-frames\\src_$\('{0:N1}' -f $t\).jpg"; ffmpeg -y -ss $t -i $src -frames:v 1 -q:v 4 -vf "scale=540:-1" $out 2>&1 | Out-Null; Write-Output "$t -> done" })
